# isthelight.gold — Magic Hour

> Find exact golden hour and twilight times for any location. Built for photographers, filmmakers, and videographers.

## What this is

A single-purpose web tool that calculates morning and evening golden hour and twilight windows for any location worldwide. Enter a ZIP code, city name, or use your device's location to get precise light timing for a chosen date.

## How it works

- Solar geometry is computed client-side using the SunCalc algorithm (Vladimir Agafonkin, MIT license)
- No backend, no database, no user data collected or stored
- Geocoding uses Open-Meteo's free geocoding API (city/town names) and Zippopotam (US ZIP codes)
- Reverse geocoding uses BigDataCloud's client-side API
- All times are returned in the searched location's local timezone

## Definitions

- **Golden hour**: period when the sun is between −4° and +6° elevation. Warm, directional light. Morning and evening.
- **Twilight**: period when the sun is between −6° and −4° elevation. Cool blue light, no harsh shadows. Morning and evening.

## Author

Jonathan Goldner — https://jonathangoldner.com
